rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LOLITA G. RIOS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Respondent Nora G Gavino To Attend Her Continued Deposition And Provide Non Evasive Responses To Questions, And A Protective Order Excluding Dom Gavino, Nora Gavinos Husband From Attending The Deposition; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Respondent Nora G Gavino And Her Attorneys; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Rodel E Rodis In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Wednesday, June 17, 2009. Petitioner Freddy O. De Guzman¿s Motion To Compel Respondent Nora G. Gavino To Attend Her Continued Deposition And Provide Non-Evasive Responses To Questions And For A Protective Order Excluding Dom Gavion From Attending The Deposition is granted as it seeks to compel Respondent Nora G. Gavino to attend her continued deposition and for a Protective Order excluding Dom Gavion, from attending the deposition. The court does not find that the deposition was suspended for the purpose of making a motion. Petitioner¿s request for sanctions is denied. =(EAH/612)
